reviewed_insights: The 2026-07-20 watched CLI change updates only package version and release-date metadata; UTF-8 stream repair behavior is unchanged and the watched Hermes web entrypoint is unchanged.

Current Hermes API capability discovery advertises run_submission, run_events_sse, object-valued endpoint descriptors, and string-valued session header metadata; AMTECH must normalize that exact public shape before selecting streaming versus polling.
Per-run toolset restriction should remain a server-side intersection and preserve explicit deny-all semantics.
Task recovery must clear every stale claim field in one transaction rather than reporting a partial unblock as success.
Background delegation and transient UI disconnects must not transfer or destroy session ownership.
Provider setup tests should wait for the actual post-setup affordance rather than treating an earlier header as readiness proof.
Credential drift across cloned runtime profiles is a first-class rotation and diagnostics risk.
Async UI tests should widen bounded wait deadlines under CI contention without adding arbitrary sleeps or slowing successful paths.
Boot-hidden UI surfaces can be moved off the first-paint path with idle mounting while preserving eager fallback and instant re-open behavior.
